title: codereview pass 1: missing match arm for InvalidChannel in Display impl
description: AnnounceError::Display does not handle InvalidChannel variant. Will cause compile error. Add arm: InvalidChannel(c) => write!(f, "invalid current_channel: {} (must be 0-7 per CCP-9)", c),
close_reason: Updated AnnounceError Display impl with specific InvalidChannel message per CCP-9. Commit 387ada5e7. Tests pass as change is to error formatting only.
